name: Dog Kids' Long Weighted Plush Throw Pillow Blue - Pillowfort™
description: Transform your kid's space with the cute comfort of this Dog Long Weighted Plush Throw Pillow from Pillowfort™. This plush throw pillow is designed in the shape of a dog wearing a heart printed tee with "Mousse" tag that comes complete with face detailing for a cute look. Featuring a polyester-spandex knit exterior and filling, this long novelty plush pillow is sure to create a comfy, friendly setting.
